subcodes.title: Words to Ali Kuli Khan spoken in June 1906
subcodes.first_line: This is one of the conditions of the teachers of the Truth; he must possess pure severance, so that his words may produce such an effect on the hearers
subcodes.subjects: @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @stories; anecdotes
